NAVAREA XIX 77/14
1. RIGLIST. CORRECT AT 091830 UTC JULY 14.
NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.
   71-15.6N 022-15.7E SCARABEO8
   73-54.5N 025-06.6E TRANSOCEAN SPITSBERGEN
   71-56.3N 020-10.1E ISLAND INNOVATOR
NOTES: A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY ZONE.
B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT
WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW
2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 74/14
